title: allium crenulatum
intro: Allium crenulatum, also known as Oregon onion grass, is a perennial plant species in the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Allium crenulatum include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in oil for herbal remedies, and its bulbs can be used fresh or dried for added potency.
